component.name: SDR for Linux
component.summary: Software-defined radio for HPSDR / ANAN transceivers

description.p: A modern GTK4/libadwaita application for HPSDR Protocol 2 radios, built on the proven piHPSDR engine and the WDSP DSP library. Full-resolution floating-point panadapter and waterfall, RX demodulation (SSB, CW, AM, digi) with low-latency PipeWire audio, and SSB/CW transmit with PureSignal linearization.

Includes a TCI server (ExpertSDR3-compatible) for skimmers, loggers and digimode software. Alpha software: the Apache Labs ANAN G1 is currently the only radio verified on real hardware — other models are blocked by a safety whitelist until they are tested.
First alpha: Protocol 2 RX/TX for the ANAN G1 — panadapter, waterfall, SSB/CW/AM/digi demodulation, SSB and CW transmit, PureSignal, TCI server, band plan overlay, DX spots.
